supported_devices: Dosing pumps, pH sensors, EC & water temperature sensors, DO sensors, ORP sensors
port_types: 3x sensor port (pH, EC/water temp, DO/ORP), 3x built-in dosing pump outlet, 24V DC power input
ai_notes: Platform-wide ML automation engine; AI Agronomist uses image recognition and NLP for plant health diagnosis, pest and disease detection (photo and voice input); weekly AI Climate Summary email reports with performance scores and recommendations. AI features require cloud connectivity. Free tier available for AI Agronomist per manufacturer.
compatible_sensors: GrowDirector pH sensor, GrowDirector EC & water temp sensor, GrowDirector DO sensor, GrowDirector ORP sensor
compatible_irrigation: any (via built-in or external dosing pumps)
recommended_use_note: Commercial and professional hydroponics; automated nutrient and pH dosing with real-time water quality monitoring (pH, EC, DO, ORP). Part of scalable GrowDirector 3 PRO modular ecosystem.
uvp_notes: Pricing by quote only; no public list price found. Contact GrowDirector sales at growdirector.com/shop/hydrodirector/
notes: Part of GrowDirector 3 PRO modular ecosystem. Made in Israel. 3 built-in peristaltic dosing pumps (up to 200 ml/min each) or connectable to external pumps (up to 200 l/min). Also supports DO and ORP sensors in addition to pH and EC/water-temp. Up to 48,000 units can be networked in series. System can maintain local automation when internet is unavailable; full remote access requires internet. Not sold on Amazon.de; primarily B2B with quote-based pricing.
